pages.text: Meditation now needs an active cultivation method. Without a method, you can still meditate, but cultivation progress will not increase.$(br2)Right-click a method book to activate it.

$(br)Each method has a cultivation limit. Basic Breathing Method and Clear Heart Method stop giving progress after Foundation Establishment Late.$(br2)A method also has a tier: human, earth, heaven, immortal, or divine.
$(br)Element methods match spirit roots. A strong match can improve speed, power, and cost. A weak match is usable but weaker. A mismatch is very poor or may fail in later methods.
